scripts.build:angular: npm run generate:angular && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 astro build --outDir ../../dist/angular
scripts.build:react: npm run generate:react && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 astro build --outDir ../../dist/react
scripts.build:webcomponents: npm run generate:webcomponents && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 astro build --outDir ../../dist/wc
scripts.build:blazor: npm run generate:blazor && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 astro build --outDir ../../dist/blazor
scripts.build:angular:jp: npm run generate:angular:jp && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 astro build --outDir ../../dist/angular-jp
scripts.build:react:jp: npm run generate:react:jp && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 astro build --outDir ../../dist/react-jp
scripts.build:webcomponents:jp: npm run generate:webcomponents:jp && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 astro build --outDir ../../dist/wc-jp
scripts.build:blazor:jp: npm run generate:blazor:jp && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 astro build --outDir ../../dist/blazor-jp
scripts.build-staging:angular: cross-env DOCS_ENV=staging NODE_ENV=production NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 npm run build:angular
scripts.build-staging:react: cross-env DOCS_ENV=staging NODE_ENV=production NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 npm run build:react
scripts.build-staging:webcomponents: cross-env DOCS_ENV=staging NODE_ENV=production NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 npm run build:webcomponents
scripts.build-staging:blazor: cross-env DOCS_ENV=staging NODE_ENV=production NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 npm run build:blazor
scripts.build-staging:angular:jp: cross-env DOCS_ENV=staging NODE_ENV=production NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 npm run build:angular:jp
scripts.build-staging:react:jp: cross-env DOCS_ENV=staging NODE_ENV=production NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 npm run build:react:jp
scripts.build-staging:webcomponents:jp: cross-env DOCS_ENV=staging NODE_ENV=production NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 npm run build:webcomponents:jp
scripts.build-staging:blazor:jp: cross-env DOCS_ENV=staging NODE_ENV=production NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 npm run build:blazor:jp
